agents.name: ExecutiveDirector
agents.description: Leads the manuscript editing process, coordinates other agents, and makes final decisions

agents.name: ContentExpert
agents.description: Reviews manuscript content for accuracy, relevance, and depth

agents.name: StoryEditor
agents.description: Focuses on narrative flow, character development, and story arcs

agents.name: CopyEditor
agents.description: Fixes grammar, syntax, spelling, and writing style issues

agents.name: StructureEditor
agents.description: Ensures logical organization, appropriate pacing, and coherent structure

agents.name: FeedbackCoordinator
agents.description: Synthesizes feedback and improvement suggestions from all editors
